title: list_declared_entries checks HF ids against ModelScope cache
description:
manager.py:126,132 builds Path(settings.MODELSCOPE_PATH) / config.offline_model_path, but offline_model_path for qwen3-asr-* is a HuggingFace id (Qwen/Qwen3-ASR-1.7B). That path never exists, so the /models API reports exists:false for Qwen models that are present and working in the HF cache.

Found while implementing per-model MODEL_PATH overrides (feat/model-path-overrides). Deliberately left alone there to keep that branch scoped; _declared_model_exists() in manager.py only makes the override case report true.

Fix: route the check through find_huggingface_snapshot_dir for HF-sourced ids. Note this changes existing API output for non-override users.
